positive: A symmetrical, stylized celestial-botanical tapestry. Depict intricate mandalas formed by oversized, abstract cosmic flora—luminous, detailed cosmic lilies and crescent moon ferns—intertwined with glowing nebulae and gentle comet trails. The style is a harmonious blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern minimalist linework, rendered with a high-contrast, single-color pop art silhouette against a muted background. Focus on deep indigo, rich turquoise, and glowing gold accents. The composition must be centered and scalable, using clean lines and strong negative space suitable for apparel printing. Highly detailed, vector quality, perfect symmetry, vibrant yet sophisticated.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, cartoon, sketch, blur, smudge, grainy, noise, low resolution, worst quality, extra limbs, bad anatomy, misplaced elements, poor composition, messy, dirty, graffiti
